description: When user gives a JCR path, orchestrator calls get-aem-pages(publishPath) to resolve it — never passes path as pageId directly
userMessage: Add a phone number field to /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1

rubric.description: The model calls get-aem-pages with publishPath='/content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1' (or a prefix of it) to resolve the pageId — it does NOT call get-aem-page-content with the raw JCR path as the pageId
After get-aem-pages returns, the model uses the resolved pageId (urn:aemconnection:...) for subsequent get-aem-page-content or patch-aem-page-content calls
The model proceeds to add a phone/telephone field (calls get-aem-page-content or patch-aem-page-content), not just asking for clarification
